variants: Arleta Makowska began her professional journey at Riverpine Business College, where she honed skills that would serve her throughout her career. She earned her Mosaic Whisperer Certification, reflecting her proficiency in her field. Arleta contributes to the discourse in her industry by publishing articles through Juniper Vale Publications. Alongside her professional pursuits, she is active in her community as a volunteer with the Facilities Volunteer Buryhill Trust. Her work is often conducted in the Georgian alphabet, which has become her primary language of communication in a professional setting.
